column1: #   trigger_regex  ERE matched against the change signal (changed file paths + diff
#                  content + an operation id). Match -> the group's suites are selected.
#   primary_suite  the single direct acceptance suite run in T0 for this group.
#   suites         all suites for the group (T1).
# Lines starting with # are ignored. Unknown/missing suite files are skipped at run time.
